test_cases.title: Verify that a user can successfully log time with valid inputs
test_cases.evidence_quote: User can successfully log time with valid inputs
preconditions: User must be allocated or permitted to log time on the project
steps: 1. Log into the Calculus application
2. Click 'Add work Log' button from the landing page
3. Select a valid date, work log category, project, hours greater than zero, and enter a work description of at least 10 characters
expected_result: The system should save the entry as Draft or submit it successfully

test_cases.title: Verify that invalid or missing inputs block submission
test_cases.evidence_quote: Invalid or missing inputs block submission.
preconditions: User must be allocated or permitted to log time on the project
steps: 1. Log into the Calculus application
2. Click 'Add work Log' button from the landing page
3. Leave one or more required fields empty
expected_result: The system should display validation messages for each missing or invalid input and block submission

test_cases.title: Verify that hours must be numeric and greater than zero
test_cases.evidence_quote: Required; Format: 0h 0m; Must be greater than 0 | "Time spent is required" / "Time must be greater than 0"
preconditions: User must be allocated or permitted to log time on the project
steps: 1. Log into the Calculus application
2. Click 'Add work Log' button from the landing page
3. Enter a non-numeric value in the hours field
expected_result: The system should display the message "Time spent is required" or "Time must be greater than 0" and block submission

test_cases.title: Verify that project is searchable from both Brac and BracIT jira and shown list must be assigned to the user
test_cases.evidence_quote: Project will be searchable from both Brac and BracIT jira and shown list must be assigned to the user.
preconditions: User must be allocated or permitted to log time on the project
steps: 1. Log into the Calculus application
2. Click 'Add work Log' button from the landing page
3. Search for a project and select it
expected_result: The system should display a list of projects assigned to the user and allow selection of a valid project

test_cases.title: Verify that the system allows submitting completed entries
test_cases.evidence_quote: The system must allow submitting completed entries.
preconditions: User must be allocated or permitted to log time on the project
steps: 1. Log into the Calculus application
2. Click 'Add work Log' button from the landing page
3. Enter valid data and click submit
expected_result: The system should save the entry as submitted successfully

test_cases.title: Verify that without allocation, the system will not allow to log time
test_cases.evidence_quote: Without allocation the system will not allow to log
steps: 1. Log into the Calculus application
2. Click 'Add work Log' button from the landing page
3. Attempt to enter data without being allocated or permitted to log time on any project
expected_result: The system should display an error message indicating that logging is not allowed and block submission

test_cases.title: Verify that if a project is archived, it must not be selectable
test_cases.evidence_quote: If project is archived, it must not be selectable
preconditions: User must be allocated or permitted to log time on the project
steps: 1. Log into the Calculus application
2. Click 'Add work Log' button from the landing page
3. Attempt to select an archived project
expected_result: The system should display an error message indicating that the selected project is archived and block selection
